title: polyscias bracteata subsp. bracteata
intro: Polyscias bracteata subsp. bracteata, also known as the 'Cabbage Palm', is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Polyscias bracteata subsp. bracteata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat various health conditions.
